\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Header file for the \doxylink{classSIEFormPMCHW}{SIEForm\+PMCHW} class. 

PMCHWT (Poggio–\+Miller–\+Chang–\+Harrington–\+Wu-\/\+Tsai) surface-\/integral formulation for penetrable objects. Supports both homogeneous and layered media.

Responsibilities\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Assemble the linear system matrix A and RHS vector b for PMCHWT.
\item Provide parallel assembly helpers (thread-\/partitioned over triangles).
\item In layered media, combine free-\/space and layered Green\textquotesingle{}s contributions. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{SIEFormPMCHW_8h_source}{SIEForm\+PMCHW.\+h}}.
